g.text: Execution cluster: skill invocations + CQ resolution +
algedonic escalation + enterprise promotion + reverse arch.
BEV-007 routes directly to BPR-008 for EP-G brownfield entry.
BPR-002 reads BOB-006 (learning entries) at Step 0.L and
writes new entries on gate-veto or feedback-revision trigger.
See governance diagram for sprint/gate/review cluster.
